title: Electrum Gear
description: Electrum armor, tools and shield with special buffs
body:
This Mod exclusively introduces a selection of finely-crafted electrum gear. Designed to seamlessly integrate with the acclaimed Create and Create: Crafts and Additions mods, this addition promises to enhance your gameplay experience.

 

 

 

 

This mod adds the Electrum Gear:

 

Armor Effect: when hit by thunder, it gets charged, when an enemy hits you, you discharges the thunder and damage the enemy

 

Full Armor Set: Thunder protection

 

  • Helmet
  • Chestplate
  • Leggings
  • Boots

 

Shield Effect: every third hit you get in the shield it gets charged, the next mob that attack you makes the shield discharges and damage them back, it's similar to thorns but it doesn't damage the shield.

 

  • Shield 

 

Sword Effect: There is a chance the sword charge when hitting enemies and grants you the speed 2 effect, also when using the sword to mining cobwebs or insta mine blocks, there is a chance it charges and gives you haste 3.

 

  • Sword

 

Tools Effect: There is a chance the tools charge and gives you the haste effect.

 

  • Pickaxe
  • Shovel
  • Axe
  • Hoe

 

Please note the charge chance, buff levels and discharge damage are configurable (configurable file included)

 

Compatibility:

 

Required:

Create: Crafts & Additions: Please note the Electrum ingot is not added by Electrum Gear mod, Electrum is a combination/alloy from Silver and gold from some mods, this mod is mainly done to work with Create: Crafts and Additions, however it has a Electrum tag you can give to other ores from other mods to make it work.

 

Optional:

 

Energized Power,This mod is also compatible with the mod called Energized Power, it allows you to repair the gear using the Energized gold.

 

Galosphere,for the silver ingot.

 

Embers Rekindled,Electrom alloy recipe from smelting (highly recomended to use with this mod.

 

 

 

Furthermore, we are excited to announce forthcoming compatibility updates tailored specifically for Farmer's Delight and Stalwart Dungeons. These enhancements will ensure a seamless integration of our electrum gear within these beloved mods, expanding your possibilities within the Minecraft universe.

We warmly encourage you to incorporate this mod into your curated modpacks, elevating your gameplay to new heights. However, we kindly request that you refrain from redistributing this mod outside of authorized platforms such as Forge. Your cooperation in respecting these guidelines ensures the integrity of our work and the vibrant community of Minecraft modding.

 

Thank you for your support, and may your adventures in Minecraft be filled with endless excitement and discovery.
